name: x-search-codex
description: Codex plugin for read-only X/Twitter research through xAI Responses API x_search.

interface.shortDescription: Search X through xAI x_search without installing Hermes.
interface.longDescription: Adds local MCP tools for read-only X/Twitter research using xAI Responses API x_search. The plugin does not manage xAI OAuth; provide an xAI bearer token or API key through the local environment.
defaultPrompt: Search X for recent posts about OpenAI.
Find recent X reactions to this news.
Fetch this X post and summarize it.
